log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Siren — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Siren — Bardic Musician HP: 46/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
